title: Templatize Portfolio

posts.author: AlessandraB (Alessandra )
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to know if it is possible to templatize a portfolio. Because I used the new Portfolio feature but added some new columns and structured it different so that it meets our needs. Now I want to set up this Portfolio in a lot of different workspaces. And I don´t want to build the Portfolio every time from the scratch. So that is why i want to templatize my Portfolio. Is that possible?

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on when we can create a template for the Portfolio board?

posts.author: Leahgracers (Leah J)
posts.cookedHtml: I also would like to have this feature, but I did find a work around – you can treat Portfolios like boards using middleware like Make.com. In Make, just create a scenario, use duplicate a board, and paste in the board ID from Monday!
